title: Fix error handling in pod start/stop.
body:
Before, errors in containers would never be printed, and a generic error would only be shown.

Signed-off-by: haircommander <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body: If only the CI thought so :'(
The CI is still hungover after partying too hard on the weekend (and the entire two weeks before...) so we'll give it a pass for now.

:pushpin: Commit 40c519b has been approved by `mheon`
